svg.text: 3.3 V logic — directly compatible with Pi Zero GPIO
Each button: one terminal → GPIO pin, other terminal → GND
Internal pull-up resistors enabled in software (mk_arcade_joystick_rpi)
All button GND terminals share common GND → any GND pin (e.g. Pin 6, 9, 14, 20, 25, 30, 34, 39)
Tip: run a single GND bus wire along all button GND terminals to minimise wiring
Board: Raspberry Pi Zero | Display: ILI9341 240×320 SPI | Input: 8× GPIO Tactile Buttons | Power: USB 5 V
